title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 12 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 12 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 12 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/03/2026
Iron ore futures showed strength today, with the main contract I2605 ulimately closing at 795.5 RMB per ton,up 1.34% from the previous trading session. Meanwhile, spot prices increased by 5-10 RMB compared to the previous trading day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm in quoting prices, while steel mills made fewer inquiries.
